description: A 'Worst of the Worst' rogues-gallery card styled as a Polaroid instant photo taped to a dark brick wall. The white-framed Polaroid contains a real booking/detainee photo of a Hispanic man with short black hair, a mustache and small soul-patch beard, wearing a dark jacket, seated in what looks like an office; on the white lower border of the Polaroid is handwritten-style black text 'DOMESTIC VIOLENCE.' Below the photo is the brand lockup: bold white serif 'Worst' with a red parallelogram 'of the' and 'Worst,' a thin vertical divider, and the location 'San Diego' in white. At the very bottom center are the DHS seal and the white 'ICE' wordmark. Propaganda technique: presents a single named-by-crime detainee in a casual scrapbook/Polaroid style as part of a recurring branded 'Worst of the Worst' series, personalizing the offender and tying the arrest to a specific ICE field office to dramatize local public-safety wins. Target audience: the general public/social-media followers.
notable_text: DOMESTIC VIOLENCE; Worst of the Worst; San Diego; ICE
